title: Broad Phase, Circle, Rect, Mask, Seam, and Swept Collision Detection · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for broad phase, circle, rect, mask, seam, and swept collision detection and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, pygame-ce, SDL, display, input, audio, filesystem, packaging, GPU, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for layered collision detection pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Choose circle, AABB, rotated bound, polygon, or mask from acceptable false positives, cost, and player expectation.
Use groups, spatial partitioning, sweep, or bounded pair sets to reduce candidates without dropping possible overlaps.
Compare squared center distance with squared radius sum and test tangent, overlap, separation, zero radius, and float tolerance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Collision Shapes · changed case · Quiz Collision Shapes
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 9692 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to layer broad-phase pruning, circle or rectangle checks, masks where justified, seam cases, and swept tests for tunneling; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates.
